case_title: JOSEPH CAMPBELL BELDEN JR VS. JOSEPH MVRACA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH CAMPBELL BELDEN, JR. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH MVRACA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
